thought_beat_text: The seam is right there—honest, unavoidable—and he's trying to tell himself that seeing it means understanding it, that clarity is enough. But the fingerprint in the clay won't let him stop at knowing; it demands he admit who made the mistake.
residue_summary: The seams are honesty now, but honesty without permission to speak is its own kind of lie.
image_hint: foam-core edge catching stage light, every imperfection suddenly visible and impossible to look away from
audio_hint: quiet scrape of something catching, then held breath
